name: LRU Cache with TTL and Stats
description: Implement an LRU cache with time-to-live support and statistics tracking across two modules. Module cache_types.py must define: CacheEntry dataclass with fields value (Any), expires_at (float, absolute monotonic timestamp), created_at (float); CacheStats dataclass with fields hits (int, default 0), misses (int, default 0), evictions (int, default 0), expirations (int, default 0). Module ttl_cache.py must import from cache_types.py and implement TTLCache class with constructor TTLCache(capacity: int, default_ttl: float | None = None) and methods: get(key) returns value or None (also returns None for expired entries and increments stats), set(key, value, ttl: float | None = None) inserts or updates an entry (evicts LRU when at capacity), delete(key) removes an entry returning True if existed, clear() empties cache and resets stats, stats() returns CacheStats snapshot. Time source must be time.monotonic(). When ttl is None in set(), use default_ttl; if default_ttl is also None, entry never expires. Lookups of expired entries must increment expirations and misses, then remove the entry.
signature:
# cache_types.py
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any

@dataclass
class CacheEntry:
    value: Any
    expires_at: float
    created_at: float

@dataclass
class CacheStats:
    hits: int = 0
    misses: int = 0
    evictions: int = 0
    expirations: int = 0

# ttl_cache.py
from cache_types import CacheEntry, CacheStats

class TTLCache:
    def __init__(self, capacity: int, default_ttl: float | None = None): ...
    def get(self, key): ...
    def set(self, key, value, ttl: float | None = None) -> None: ...
    def delete(self, key) -> bool: ...
    def clear(self) -> None: ...
    def stats(self) -> CacheStats: ...
tests:
def test_basic_set_get():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3)
    c.set('a', 1)
    assert c.get('a') == 1

def test_miss_returns_none():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3)
    assert c.get('missing') is None
    assert c.stats().misses == 1

def test_lru_eviction():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=2)
    c.set('a', 1)
    c.set('b', 2)
    c.get('a')
    c.set('c', 3)
    assert c.get('b') is None
    assert c.get('a') == 1
    assert c.get('c') == 3
    assert c.stats().evictions == 1

def test_ttl_expiration():
    import time
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3, default_ttl=0.05)
    c.set('x', 1)
    assert c.get('x') == 1
    time.sleep(0.1)
    assert c.get('x') is None
    assert c.stats().expirations == 1

def test_per_call_ttl():
    import time
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3)
    c.set('a', 1, ttl=0.05)
    c.set('b', 2)
    time.sleep(0.1)
    assert c.get('a') is None
    assert c.get('b') == 2

def test_delete():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=2)
    c.set('a', 1)
    assert c.delete('a') is True
    assert c.delete('a') is False
    assert c.get('a') is None

def test_update_refreshes_lru():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=2)
    c.set('a', 1)
    c.set('b', 2)
    c.set('a', 10)
    c.set('c', 3)
    assert c.get('a') == 10
    assert c.get('b') is None

def test_stats_hits_misses():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3)
    c.set('a', 1)
    c.get('a')
    c.get('a')
    c.get('missing')
    s = c.stats()
    assert s.hits == 2
    assert s.misses == 1

def test_clear_resets():
    c = TTLCache(capacity=2)
    c.set('a', 1)
    c.get('a')
    c.get('missing')
    c.clear()
    assert c.get('a') is None
    s = c.stats()
    assert s.hits == 0 and s.misses == 1

def test_no_ttl_never_expires():
    import time
    c = TTLCache(capacity=3)
    c.set('forever', 42)
    time.sleep(0.05)
    assert c.get('forever') == 42
constraints: Eviction policy is strict LRU based on access order (get and set both count as access)
Expired entries must be removed when accessed and counted in expirations
set() with capacity exceeded must evict exactly one LRU entry and increment evictions
stats() returns a snapshot, not a live reference
